SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.description: Heal an amount of hp equal to [gold]Cure[/gold] stacks at the end if your turn. If you are not at full health at the end of your turn, every instance of unblocked damage halves its [gold]Cure[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.smartDescription: Heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] hp at the end of your turn. If you are not at full health at the end of your turn, every instance of unblocked damage halves your [gold]Cure[/gold].
SPACEMERCS-CURE_POWER.title: Cure
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.description: When the creature reaches [blue]10[/blue] stacks, deal [blue]30[/blue] damage to it and [blue]15[/blue] to all other enemies. If no stacks are applied to the creature during your turn, the enemy loses half its stacks.
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.smartDescription: When this creature reaches [blue]10[/blue] stacks, deal [blue]30[/blue] damage to it and [blue]15[/blue] to all other enemies. If no stacks are applied to this creature during your turn, this enemy loses half its stacks.
SPACEMERCS-SCORCH_POWER.title: Scorch
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies equal to [gold]Thermite[/gold] stacks.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Scorch[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SPACEMERCS-THERMITE_POWER.title: Thermite
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.descript: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade", return it to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you play a card containing "Grenade", return it to your hand.
SPACEMERCS-ASHES_TO_ASHES_POWER.title: Ashes to Ashes
SPACEMERCS-PERCUSSIVE_FLAMES_POWER.title: Percussive Flames
